title: 15cm Tall Silver Pillar Candle 50mm Diameter
features: 【Perfect Gift for Guitarist】This set comes with 6pcs Celluloid Guitar Picks.
【Perfect shape】Standard 351 plectrum size ideal for all types of player.
【Smooth and Sturdy】 Celluloid material provides you a great sound on your instrument.Sturday enough to withstand everyday use.
【Compatible Instruments】Ideal Pletrums for Electric, Acoustic or Bass Guitar, Ukulele and more.
【Pack】6 pack picks(0.71mm) and 1 leather picks holder included.
description: A set of 6 guitar picks. These are the popular 0.71mm medium gauge plectrums. They are printed on both sides. Together with a genuine leather key ring - holder. This will hold all six plectrums. The perfect gift for your guitar playing friends.
